# Frontend Test Screenshots

Captured from the live secure-email web UI with automated local browser interaction.

Smart backend during capture: `ollama:llama3.2:latest`

Current attachment policy in this build:
- all file types can be uploaded
- image AI and transforms are image-only

- `01_main_console_real.png`: 1. Live Mail Console
- `02_cross_domain_delivery_real.png`: 2. Cross-Domain Delivery
- `03_concurrency_stability_real.png`: 3. Concurrency and Stability
- `04_bruteforce_lockout_real.png`: 4. Brute-Force Protection
- `05_send_rate_limit_real.png`: 5. High-Frequency Send Limit
- `06_phishing_detection_real.png`: 6. Phishing Detection
- `07_attachment_management_real.png`: 7. Attachment Management
- `08_attachment_send_receive_real.png`: 8. Attachment Send and Preview
- `09_security_lab_real.png`: 9. Independent Security Lab
- `10_storage_dedup_frontend_real.png`: 10. Dedup Upload View
- `11_storage_dedup_backend_web.png`: 11. Dedup Backend Evidence
